mapper.select:
SELECT e.sup_enterprise_name AS supEnterpriseName, e.unit_name AS unitName, e.business_place AS businessPlace, e.business_scope AS businessScope, et.dark_logo AS darkLogo, et.light_color_logo AS lightColorLogo, e.social_credit_code AS socialCreditCode FROM sup_enterprise e LEFT JOIN eco_chain_extended_table et ON e.social_credit_code = et.social_credit_code
AND e.social_credit_code = #{collectId}

SELECT e.unit_name AS unitName, ep.picture AS productPicture, ep.product_name AS productName, ep.eco_chain_product_parameter_id AS productParameterId, ep.id AS productId, se.sup_enterprise_name AS supEnterpriseName, se.business_place AS businessPlace FROM eco_chain_product_manager ep LEFT JOIN sup_enterprise e ON ep.social_credit_code = e.social_credit_code LEFT JOIN sup_enterprise se ON ep.social_credit_code = se.social_credit_code
AND ep.id = #{collectId}

SELECT pe.people_name AS peopleName, pe.job AS peopleJob, pe.contact_phone AS contactPhone, pe.enterprise_name AS enterpriseName, pe.picture AS peoplePicture FROM people_enterprise pe
AND pe.id = #{collectId}
